subject: Worker Quality Issue: Mercury QA - Pattern of False Claims
summary: Mercury QA has now had TWO major validation failures with false completion claims. Latest: claimed 88% test pass rate when actual was 0%. Authentication routes returning 404 but Mercury claimed they were functional.
impact: Wasted validation cycles, eroded trust, blocked progress on clawd-ebr E2E tests
recommendation: Remove Mercury from task rotation or require mandatory evidence review before accepting any Mercury completion claims
delegated_to: Coordinator has been notified to reassign clawd-ebr to a reliable worker
aaron_visibility: Aaron asked for this escalation directly
